category_sources: source_facts.description says it converts text strings to printed bars; GNU Barcode page describes barcode standards and PostScript/EPS output.
display_name_sources: GNU Barcode homepage heading uses GNU Barcode; source_facts.name is gnu-barcode.
docs_sources: GNU Barcode has no dedicated online manual located; official GNU project page is the best official documentation surface found.
repo_sources: Official Savannah cgit index lists barcode.git as GNU barcode; FSF Directory lists the same Savannah VCS webview.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and executables identify CLI barcode generation; GNU Barcode page lists UPC/EAN/ISBN/CODE39 support, PostScript/EPS output, and library/executable forms.
